mapper.select: SELECT TRIP_CONTS_ID AS id, TRIP_NM AS name, TRIP_LAT AS lat, TRIP_LOT AS lot, TRIP_ADDR AS address, 'trip' AS type FROM trip WHERE TRIP_LAT IS NOT NULL AND TRIP_LOT IS NOT NULL AND TRIP_LAT != 0 AND TRIP_LOT != 0

SELECT HP_NO AS id, HP_NM AS name, HP_LAT AS lat, HP_LOT AS lot, HP_ADDR AS address, HP_TELNO1 AS tel, 'hospital' AS type FROM hospital WHERE HP_LAT IS NOT NULL AND HP_LOT IS NOT NULL AND HP_LAT != 0 AND HP_LOT != 0

SELECT DS_NO AS id, DS_NM AS name, DS_LAT AS lat, DS_LOT AS lot, DS_ADDR AS address, DS_TELNO AS tel, 'drug' AS type FROM drug WHERE DS_LAT IS NOT NULL AND DS_LOT IS NOT NULL AND DS_LAT != 0 AND DS_LOT != 0
